Name: bAllBodiesAreMoveable
Description: Moveable physics on all scene props; no sokf_moveable flag will be needed.

Name: bRagdollHeadshots
Description: Uses a ragdoll with shot force when killing an agent with a crossbow, musket, or pistol on a non-hand and non-leg hit. Operations - options_get_realistic_headshots, options_set_realistic_headshots.

Name: fRagdollPurgeTime
Description: End ragdoll, when this time has passed.

Name: fRagdollOnGroundPurgeTime
Description: End ragdoll, when agent on ground and this time has passed.

Name: fRagdollInactivePurgeTime
Description: End ragdoll, when ragdoll inactive and this time has passed.

Name: fMaxDeltaTimeStep
Description: Time step for advancement state of ragdoll simulation. Operation - set_physics_delta_time.

Name: fMaxSlowMotionDeltaTimeStep
Description: Same, if cheat mode slow-motion enabled.

Name: bRagdollSoak
Description: Blows is beaten on corpses and thus prevents an unintentional teamhits.

Name: bRagdollSoakApplyForce
Description: Apply blow force to beaten on corpses.
